articles.title: India’s Apparel Exports: Building on Strength, Closing the Gaps
articles.summary: The global apparel sourcing map is being redrawn. India’s place on it is more complicated, and more promising, than it appears. Across the five categories tracked in this analysis, India’s apparel exports grew 3% yearon-year in 2025, from US $9.44 billion to US $9.72 billion. Bangladesh grew far faster at 10.1%, reaching US $31.92 billion, […] The post India’s Apparel Exports: Building on Strength, Closing the Gaps appeared first on Apparel Resources .

articles.title: This PlayStation 1 Keepsake Ornament Fires Up the Console's Iconic Startup Sound at the Press of a Button
articles.summary: Hallmark has added the PlayStation Console Ornament With Light and Sound to its 2026 Keepsake collection, turning the original PlayStation into a palm-sized Christmas ornament that does more than hang from a branch. Designed by artist Orville Wilson, the piece recreates Sony's landmark console and its accompanying controller in miniature, with a working power button that lights up the unit and plays the PS1's signature startup sequence.The ornament measures 4 inches wide, 3.75 inches tall, and 1.5 inches deep, placing it in the mid-range of Hallmark's Keepsake lineup in terms of physical footprint. It is constructed in plastic with a hanger attachment for tree display, though its detail level and interactive features position it equally well as a shelf or desk piece for collectors who woul

articles.summary: Summary Kylian Mbappé won his second consecutive FIFA World Cup Golden Boot by finishing the 2026 tournament with 10 goalsLionel Messi finished second in the scoring race with eight goals after going goalless in Argentina's final loss to SpainThe French forward also established a new tournament record by reaching 22 all-time career World Cup goals FIFA has officially awarded the 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Boot to French superstar Kylian Mbappé following the conclusion of the tournament. The 27-year-old forward secured his second consecutive scoring title by finishing with 10 goals, edging out rival Lionel Messi.Mbappé solidified his lead by netting two goals during France's 6-4 third-place playoff against England, bringing his total to 10 goals alongside four assists. Offered in three distinct variants, from pink, black to green, the loafer silhouette is rendered in smooth black leather to maintain Dr. Martens’ classic construction while introducing a vibrant, punk‑inspired aesthetic. Each pair features Wasted Youth's signature "bowtie" silhouette logo as a repeat-motif pattern, embossed on the sides near the heel.Additional details include co‑branded insoles and subtle Wasted Youth lettering, reinforcing the collaborative identity without overwhelming the sho

articles.summary: Name: Kiko Kostadinov x ASICS US8-S GEL-SJ33Colorway: Black Coffee/Orange Lily, Roasted Coffee/BluebellSKU: 1203B116.200, 1203B116.201MSRP: ¥24,200 JPY (approx. $149 USD)Release Date: July 31Where to Buy: ASICSCurated by Kiko Kostadinov in partnership with ASICS, the newly unveiled US8-S GEL-SJ33 seamlessly bridges 2010s running heritage with avant-garde streetwear aesthetics. Drawing heavy inspiration from the archival GEL-SUPER J33, the updated silhouette features a highly intricate, seamless upper designed to conceptually mimic natural biological membranes. articles.title: A$AP Rocky's Latest PUMA Launch Has Him Reminiscing on 1994
articles.summary: For A$AP Rocky's new PUMA Suede design, he had to take it to the streets of his hometown to celebrate — Pell Street, in particular. Flacko elected to host at the Lucky Dragon in Chinatown the night before the global launch, opening the dim sum venue to the public for a pop-up during the afternoon, and inviting press later in the evening.The intimate eatery was transformed into a red-hued, Rocky-fied universe. The shoes were set up in dim sum boxes, A$AP Rocky x PUMA fortune cookies filled the tables, and guests were encouraged to visit the charm station (disguised as a noodle bar, with charms handed over in takeout boxes).PUMA’s Creative Director for over three years now, Rocky has racked up a Rolodex of fresh silhouettes and reimagined archival revivals during his tenure thus far. Yet aga

articles.summary: Name: Salehe Bembury PUMA NITRO Velum 2SKU: TBCRelease Date: TBCSalehe Bembury has teased the upcoming PUMA NITRO Velum 2 on Instagram, offering a first look at the sequel to his debut Velum silhouette. The image highlights the sneaker’s sculptural upper, built with metallic silver synthetic overlays and breathable mesh windows arranged in fluid, wavy lines.The layered construction emphasizes movement while maintaining a futuristic edge, with black detailing along the lace panels and logos providing contrast. A textured yellow midsole anchors the design, adding energy and visual depth to the streamlined runner. While official release details remain unconfirmed, the previewed silhouette appears to be complete, which could mean that the launch is expected soon. Click here to view full galler

articles.title: Take a First Look at the Nike Vomero Plus “Cheat Day”
articles.summary: Name: Nike Vomero Plus “Cheat Day”SKU: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike has unveiled the first look at the Vomero Plus “Cheat Day”, a playful reinterpretation of the performance‑driven runner. Inspired by the finger‑staining allure of Cheetos, the sneaker pairs humor with technical precision, positioning itself as both collectible and functional.The upper is constructed from lightweight, breathable mesh in cream and sail tones, serving as a neutral backdrop for the vibrant orange gradient that dominates the toe. Complementary details include orange lace tips and a matching heel tab, echoing the striking forefoot finish and reinforcing the snack‑inspired theme. Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast

articles.title: The Sony Playstation 6 Might Be a Handheld Digital Console
articles.summary: Summary Sony Interactive Entertainment CEO Hideaki Nishino signaled a major strategy shift during a recent investor meeting by emphasizing gaming "beyond the living room" and transitioning to a "true digital platform business/"The executive's comments coupled with a recent decision to phase out physical game discs suggest the upcoming PlayStation 6 will likely be designed as a handheld or hybrid device similar to the Nintendo Switch.Future hardware is expected to prioritize digital distribution through the PlayStation Store while maintaining backward compatibility for digital PS4 and PS5 libraries. The new silhouette adapts Reebok’s athletic Premier running heritage into an open-back, slip-on format, balancing performance-inspired design with casual lifestyle utility. The upper features a dynamic mix of layered mesh, synthetic panels, and bold overlays that accentuate its sculptural profile. Underfoot, a chunky, sculpted midsole is paired with a rugged tread pattern to guarantee reliable traction and stability in a laceless format.The upcoming lineup spans a diverse range of bold, multi-tonal colorways alongside understated, neutral palettes. articles.title: The Nike x Kith Linen Collection Unearths 25 Years of Sneaker History
articles.summary: SUMMARYThe "Un-Linen" Air Force 1 flips the classic color blocking with a pink leather upper and brown SwooshA companion Air Max 95 stays true to the original palette by utilizing a brown upper with pink Air bubblesKith and Nike are unearthing 25 years of sneaker history with the upcoming release of the Kith x Nike "Linen" Collection. Scheduled for a Summer 2026 release, the two-shoe pack builds on Ronnie Fieg's decade-long obsession with the retro colorway, delivering a completely inverted take on the Air Force 1 alongside a new translation of the Air Max 95.Originally released in 2001 as a Japan-exclusive (CO.JP) Air Force 1, the soft brown and pink palette became a grail for collectors. articles.summary: Name: New Balance 1954RMSRP: $190 USDRelease Date: Available Now (SOMEWHERE®), July 17 (New Balance)Where to Buy: SOMEWHERE, New BalanceWashington D.C.–based boutique SOMEWHERE® has secured an exclusive early release of New Balance’s newest silhouette, the 1954R, ahead of its global debut. Inspired by the city’s longstanding affinity for grey New Balance sneakers, the model merges design elements from the 2002 and 1906 heritage shoes.The name itself - 1954 - derives from the average of those two model numbers, underscoring its hybrid identity. The upper combines premium pig suede, synthetic overlays, and breathable mesh, while the sole construction borrows from both predecessors to create a balanced marriage of cushioning and stability.
